name: Agnikul Cosmos

overview.value: AgniKul Cosmos Private Limited is an Indian private aerospace manufacturer and commercial launch service provider based at the National Centre for Combustion Research and Development, IIT Madras, Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It was founded on 1 December 2017 by Srinath Ravichandran, Moin SPM, Satyanaryan Chakravarthy and Janardhana Raju. The company aims to develop and launch its own small-lift launch vehicle, Agnibaan, capable of placing a 100 kg payload into a 700 km orbit.

focus.value: Custom Orbital Launch Vehicles & Private Space Missions

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.

events.headline: Agnikul Cosmos sets up India's first private space vehicle launchpad at Sriharikota
Agnikul launches Agnibaan SOrTeD, India's first private-pad orbital-class test flight
